title: Floral Blaze Raw Wrap
description: A post-workout Algerian dish featuring a floral blend of red chilli and spices wrapped in raw-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp red chilli paste
ingredients.notes: Can be mixed with a bit of water to make it easier to apply.

ingredients.name: 1/4 tsp turmeric powder
ingredients.notes: For the golden hue and flavor enhancement.

ingredients.name: Pinch of black pepper
ingredients.notes: For a slight heat and aromatic kick.

ingredients.name: 1 cup raw yogurt or goat cheese
ingredients.notes: For a creamy base to the wrap.

instructions: Apply red chilli paste and spices over cucumber, carrot, bell pepper, and cherry tomatoes.
Mix olive oil into red chilli mixture for better coating on veggies.
Lay julienned vegetables in circular pattern on wrap dough.
Top with raw yogurt or goat cheese evenly across the fillings.
Fold the wrap to enclose all ingredients tightly.
Let it rest at room temperature for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
